title: 3. Extraordinary connection of kidney and Sanjiao: Song of Jade Dragon and Ode o
text:
indicate that SJ6 and KD6 combination is for treating constipation.  Zhongzhu (SJ3) on the Sanjiao
channel and Fuliu (KD7) on the kidney channel form a great combination in treating lumbago.  Those
are the examples of the extraordinary connection of the kidney and Sanjiao.
